THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT STANLEY DINTCHO, DDS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-CLAIMANT ROBERT RICH IS PRESENT. MR. RICH INFORMS THE COURT DR. DINTCHO IS DECEASED. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCES MADE TODAY ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT GRANTS MR. RICH'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE THE HEARING ON HIS CROSS-CLAIM SO THAT HE MAY INFORM DR. DINTCHO'S SUCCESSOR OF THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
